---
title: "Publications"
---

```{css}
#| echo: false
h1 {
  display: none;
}
h2 {
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(57, 97, 117, 0.25);
  margin-top: 1.75rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.pub-id {
  color: rgba(57, 97, 117, 0.72);
  text-decoration: underline;
  text-decoration-color: rgba(57, 97, 117, 0.35);
  text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
.pub-id:hover {
  color: #396175;
  text-decoration-color: #396175;
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis

pubs <- yaml::yaml.load_file("src/pubs.yaml")
years <- pubs |>
  purrr::map_int("year") |>
  unique() |>
  sort(decreasing = TRUE)

format_publication <- function(pub) {
  value <- function(key) {
    item <- pub[[key]]
    if (is.null(item) || length(item) == 0 || is.na(item)) {
      return("")
    }
    as.character(item)
  }

  doi <- value("doi")
  pmid <- value("pmid")
  doi <- gsub("^https?://(dx[.])?doi[.]org/", "", doi, ignore.case = TRUE)
  doi <- trimws(doi)
  pmid <- trimws(pmid)

  identifier <- ""
  if (doi != "") {
    identifier <- glue::glue('<a class="pub-id" href="https://doi.org/{doi}">doi: {doi}</a>')
  } else if (pmid != "") {
    identifier <- glue::glue('<a class="pub-id" href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/{pmid}/">pmid: {pmid}</a>')
  }

  fields <- c(
    paste(pub$author, collapse = ", "),
    glue::glue("**{pub$title}**"),
    glue::glue("*{pub$journal}*"),
    value("issue_pages"),
    value("year"),
    identifier
  )

  paste(fields[fields != ""], collapse = ". ")
}

years |>
  purrr::map_chr(\(year) {
    year_pubs <- purrr::keep(pubs, \(pub) pub$year == year)
    paste0(
      "## ", year, " {#year-", year, "}\n\n",
      year_pubs |>
        purrr::map_chr(format_publication) |>
        paste(collapse = "\n\n")
    )
  }) |>
  cat(sep = "\n\n")
```
